title: Mexican Peppery Potato Bake
description: A spicy twist on the classic potato bake, infused with the bold flavors of Mexico. Perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Poke some holes in the potatoes with a fork to allow steam to escape.
Rub the potatoes with olive oil and season with salt and pepper.
Place the potatoes on a baking sheet and bake for 45 minutes.
While the potatoes are baking, mix the peppery sauce and mediterranean cheese in a bowl.
When the potatoes are done, remove them from the oven and top each potato with the peppery sauce mixture.
Sprinkle chopped cilantro on top and serve hot.
